rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex blocks or fixing syntax errors
Ensure AGREE annex blocks are properly closed with `};`
Use only visible identifiers in contracts; do not reference implementation-only subcomponents
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation annex scope
Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts; do not reference implementation-only subcomponents
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate component type or implementation annex scope
Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence for stateful equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `if ... then ... else` for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Use `0.0 -> pre(t) + step` for stateful equations in AGREE contracts
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in guarantees
Do not use AGREE scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean'; use 'int', 'real', and 'bool' instead
